description: With a soft footbed and lace-up front, these shoes from fila are assured to support your exercise regime as well as outings with friends.Upper Synthetic upper for longer shoe life Lace-up front for snug Fit Padded tongue for soft feel Padded sockliner for snug fit and shock absorption Rubber heel counter embedded into the upper for longer shoe life Perforations around the toe box for ventilation Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for better shock absorption Soft footbed for an ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with rib pattern below the toe area for flexible 180 degree movement Ridges below the heel counter for stability on all surfaces Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
